cwe.note: Improper Authentication — the password confirmation step is an authentication check; bypassing it is an authentication failure within an access-control context
Authentication Bypass by Assumed-Immutable Data — directly covers bypassing a re-authentication gate
Improper Access Control — umbrella; the confirmation step is an access-control enforcement point

owasp_top10.note: Identification and Authentication Failures — relevant because the bypassed step is an authentication gate

owasp_api10.note: Broken Authentication — password confirmation is a re-authentication mechanism

bugcrowd_vrt.note: No specific VRT leaf for password confirmation bypass; maps to the broken access control parent
